findings.title: Cre4T3Tiv3/unsloth-llama3-alpaca-lora
findings.description: Custom model training using modern architectures. 4-bit QLoRA fine-tuning pipeline for LLaMA 3 8B with production-grade optimization. Memory-efficient training on consumer GPUs. Published adapter on HuggingFace. From training pipeline to deployed model.

findings.title: codewithdark-git/QuantLLM
findings.description: QuantLLM is a Python library designed for developers, researchers, and teams who want to fine-tune and deploy large language models (LLMs) efficiently using 4-bit and 8-bit quantization techniques.

findings.title: rafia9005/Fine-TuningLLM
findings.description: This model is a fine-tuned version of the unsloth/llama-3-8b-bnb-4bit model, specifically adapted for SQL-related tasks using the b-mc2/sql-create-context dataset. It leverages the PEFT (Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning) library for efficient training and is optimized for graph-ml tasks.

findings.title: hamdiaya/chat_model_fine_tuning
findings.description: Fine-tuning unsloth/Meta-Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct-bnb-4bit using QLoRA on the pookie3000/pg_chat dataset as part of my LLM fine-tuning journey

findings.title: Mignar99/LLMFineTuningExperiments
findings.description: A small collection of personal experiments on fine-tuning 4-bit LLMs (gpt-oss-20b MXFP4 and Phi-3-mini-4k-instruct-4bit) using also GRPO on a Mac Pro M1.

findings.title: riphunter7001x/fine-tunig-LLama3-on-Imdb-dataset-using-unsloth
findings.description: I fine-tune a LLama-3 7B LLM (4bit) on the IMDB dataset for text generation, all within Google Colab using Unsloth.
